settings.cart_intro: This static-safe cart foundation keeps the approved Mzansi Select premium-practical tone in place with clear line items, a calm order summary, and supportive reassurance while live cart and checkout wiring remain deferred.
settings.empty_description: The empty-cart experience is now in place, but live cart items, totals, and checkout behaviour remain intentionally deferred until a later approved slice.
settings.support_copy: Our team is available seven days a week to help with delivery timing, returns, and choosing practical everyday essentials.
